original_image_tags: The back of a typewritten document on United States Government stationery. The text from the front side is faintly visible through the paper. The stationery header at the top is upside down and reversed. A blue ink stamp is visible at the bottom right. A handwritten signature or annotation is at the bottom left.

elements.description: A blue ink stamp containing the words 'RECEIVED LIAISON SECTION' and 'INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I.' along with a date stamp 'SEP 10 2 19 PM '47' and a handwritten annotation '9-17-47' next to it. The stamp is positioned at the bottom right of the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the existence and location of a blue ink stamp, but B provides extensive specific quoted text that A does not mention or contradict.
